extraction_notes: Wikipedia source provides composer name (Raphaël Gesqua) only. No documented information available regarding: tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, modes, energy levels, melodic characteristics, SFX specifications per area, or overall audio style. Genesis version has full background music during fights; Amiga version noted as having only three tunes with no background music during fights. Game Boy version criticized for music being 'far too pervasive'. Insufficient music documentation prevents detailed track-level extraction.
